description: Remove the '2.35× faster' numeric speedup comparison, as no rigorous quantitative bridge is established between R(d) representation-count growth (Bourgain-Kontorovich asymptotics) and empirical density convergence. Explicitly specify that the exponent 2δ−1 = 0.062 is relevant to the maximal number of representations R(d), not directly to unique covered denominator density.
action_taken: Remove the '2.35× faster' numeric speedup comparison, as no rigorous quantitative bridge is established between R(d) representation-count growth (Bourgain-Kontorovich asymptotics) and empirical density convergence.
